seoTitle: Hastings vs Hattah — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hastings and Hattah. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hastings and Hattah.
heading: Hastings vs Hattah — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hastings, Victoria and Hattah, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hastings has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Hattah (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hastings or Hattah safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hastings has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Hattah scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hastings scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Hattah scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hastings or Hattah?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hastings has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
